title: Sales Manager Vacancy at PropTiger - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at PropTiger - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? PropTiger in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
